title: Raccoon Removal in Union, NJ | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Union, New Jersey. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations safely and humanely. Call now for same-day service. $900 – $4,000.
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Union, NJ, where residential neighborhoods and proximity to wooded areas create ideal conditions for these intelligent wildlife pests. From attics in historic homes near Connecticut Farms to commercial properties along Route 22, raccoons can cause significant structural damage and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services throughout Union with pricing from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife management experience to Union residents and businesses, combining humane trapping methods with comprehensive exclusion services. Our licensed technicians are available for emergency same-day service throughout Union Township and provide detailed follow-up inspections to prevent future raccoon intrusions.
localContext: Union's mix of single-family homes, the Caldwell Parsonage historic site area, and commercial districts near the Vauxhall section all face unique raccoon challenges, particularly during breeding season when mothers seek attic spaces for denning. The township's mature trees and proximity to green spaces like Friberger Park make raccoon activity especially common in residential neighborhoods throughout the area.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Union typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the infestation (attic, chimney, crawlspace), extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. A single raccoon in an accessible area costs less than a mother with babies requiring extensive repairs and sealing.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Union, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Union due to the township's suburban setting with abundant food sources, mature trees, and residential structures that provide shelter. Neighborhoods near wooded areas and parks experience particularly high raccoon activity, especially during spring breeding season and fall when raccoons seek winter denning sites.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Union property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Union for urgent raccoon situations. Initial trapping typically begins within 24 hours of your call, with most raccoons removed within 3-7 days depending on the number of animals. Complete exclusion and damage repair work is scheduled immediately after removal to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Union homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons in Union homes commonly tear insulation, chew electrical wiring, damage roof vents and soffits, and leave hazardous feces in attics and crawlspaces. They can also destroy chimneys, rip apart ductwork, and cause water damage by damaging roof structures. Their waste can carry raccoon roundworm and other diseases, requiring professional sanitization after removal.
